name: node-chalk
title: node-chalk
description:
Terminal string styling for Node.js
Chalk is a Node.js module which provides string styling via ANSI escape codes
without extending String.prototype.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-chalk as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-chalk with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-chalk --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
